steps.title: Check current alertmanager deployment
steps.description:
Verify your alertmanager version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n alertmanager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=alertmanager
helm list -n alertmanager 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working alertmanager installation.

steps.title: Review alertmanager configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant alertmanager configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n alertmanager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=alertmanager
kubectl get configmap -n alertmanager -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=alertmanager
```
Is there a way to check if the config is valid? (similar to promtool with Prometheus)

Thanks.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Validate config
steps.description:
This is similar to `promtool check-config` and allows one
to validate the alertmanager configuration (as a git presubmit for example).

`govendor fetch github.com/spf13/{cobra,pflag}` was needed to
have support for `Args`.

This fixes #333 

```
$ ./amtool check-config alertmanager.yml
```yaml
$ ./amtool check-config alertmanager.yml ./doc/examples/simple.yml 
Checking 'alertmanager.yml'  SUCCESS
Found 1 templates:   FAILED: template: foo.tmpl:3: unexpected {{end}}

Checking './doc/examples/simple.yml'  SUCCESS
Found 1 templates:   SUCCESS

Error: Failed to validate 1 file(s).
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n alertmanager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=alertmanager
kubectl get events -n alertmanager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Validate config" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
This is similar to `promtool check-config` and allows one
to validate the alertmanager configuration (as a git presubmit for example).

`govendor fetch github.com/spf13/{cobra,pflag}` was needed to
have support for `Args`.
codeSnippets:
$ ./amtool check-config alertmanager.yml ./doc/examples/simple.yml 
Checking 'alertmanager.yml'  SUCCESS
Found 1 templates:   FAILED: template: foo.tmpl:3: unexpected {{end}}

Checking './doc/examples/simple.yml'  SUCCESS
Found 1 templates:   SUCCESS

Error: Failed to validate 1 file(s).

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with alertmanager installed or the issue environment reproducible.
